target: S-level ai-native enforcement — runtime feedback + cost model + semantic IR + learning
honest_scope: months of work spanning hexa-lang + n6-architecture + anima. Not a single-session task.

items.title: L4 O(n^2) concat detector
items.impl: ~80 LOC added to tool/ai_native_lint.hexa (text scan + for/while context)

items.title: benchmark harness 표준화
items.target: every perf-sensitive .hexa gets a bench fixture + deterministic runner
items.impl: tool/bench_runner.hexa — iters/warmup/CI-style tables; integrate with existing bench/

items.title: @attr catalog registry
items.target: single source of truth for @hot/@memoize/@parallel/@fuse/@lazy/... with semantic contract
items.impl: self/attrs/attrs.json — 50+ attrs, each with {purpose, cost_rule, side_effect, sat_test}

items.title: profile dump on execution
items.impl: interpreter.hexa or hexa_full.hexa: call_stack timing + exit dump. ~100 LOC.

items.title: profile → @hot auto-suggest
items.target: next run / next commit: top-K fn without @attr gets auto-proposed @hot
items.impl: self/opt/pgo.hexa (new file) — reads profile JSON, emits diff suggestion

items.title: profile-guided memo detection
items.target: pure fn with repeated identical args → auto @memoize candidate

items.title: @select meta-DSL
items.impl: parser extension for @select syntax + codegen branching

items.title: auto-learn from benchmarks
items.target: bench run produces (n, algo, time) triples → regression fit → registry update

items.title: algorithm_swap pass
items.target: bubble sort pattern → emit merge sort (when correctness-preserved)

items.title: auto @fuse detection
items.target: back-to-back matmul / matadd → qkv_fused / ffn_fused builtins

items.title: auto @lazy
items.target: expr that may not be consumed (if-branch, default-arg) → lazy wrap

items.title: property test auto-gen
items.target: @attr 적용 시 semantic contract 에 매핑된 property test 자동 생성

items.title: FFI marshalling 최소화
items.target: hexa → C 경계의 불필요 변환 제거 (특히 string/array)

dependencies.S1→S2: profile data required for cost model learning
dependencies.S2→S3: cost model enables safe algorithm_swap (otherwise risky)
dependencies.S-all→benchmark_harness: without S0-2, later phases cannot measure

realistic_timeline.bottleneck: hexa_full.hexa 수정 필요한 항목들은 bg agent 활동 시 불안전

today_action_plan: 4. 커밋 후 다음 세션에서 S-1 착수

S1b_runtime_feedback.note: source-transform profiler — hexa_full.hexa untouched; tool/ai_native_profile.hexa + t61 fixture PASS (fib 50 calls)

S1c_atomic_counters_scout.note: scout-only: 2 comment anchors added to self/hexa_full.hexa (module-state L5387, call_user_fn L8650) + self/hexa_full.profile_hook.hexa.draft with full patch proposal (parallel arrays + 64-bucket cache + env-gated tick, HEXA_PROFILE=1 opt-in). Zero behavior change; no rebuild needed. Apply is S1c-apply follow-up.

S2b_cost_learner.note: self/opt/cost_learner.hexa 208 LOC, 19 family×candidate groups, bench_results.jsonl consumer

S2c_select_dsl.note: self/parser.hexa @attr loop now recognizes @select(family, cond -> algo, ..., else -> algo) and serializes to FnDecl.annotations as 'select|FAMILY@@COND~>ALGO@@...'. tests/t_parser_select_attr.hexa 7/7 PASS under current interp (forward-compat). Codegen wiring deferred to S-2d.

S2d_select_codegen.note: SAFER path: pure-hexa consumer self/opt/select_dispatch.hexa (178 LOC) + tests/t_select_dispatch_parse.hexa (11 cases). Parses 'select|FAMILY@@COND~>ALGO@@...@@else~>DEFAULT' from FnDecl.annotations (self/parser.hexa 7550ae7) and renders the equivalent C prologue — if/elif chain tail-calling each algo fn, explicit default return when `else ->` present, fallthrough to annotated fn body otherwise. Codegen_c2 integration call-site (one line in gen2_fn_decl reading node.annotations) deferred: (a) interp is arm64 Mach-O and this host is Linux x86_64, (b) FnDecl.annotations propagates through interp AST only after next HX8 rebuild on macOS. History: initially landed in 4d9a2e0 (orphaned by concurrent sibling reset); re-landed on main in 82fe313 with correct commit message. Chore commit 87098e0 recorded HELPER_LANDED status but with the orphan hash; this is the hash-fix follow-up. No touch: self/parser.hexa, self/hexa_full.hexa, self/codegen_c2.hexa, self/opt/algorithm_swap.hexa, tool/ai_native_testgen.hexa, self/attrs/*, self/attr_cli.hexa, shared/roadmaps/p7_zero_c.json.

S3_semantic_IR_passes.note: S-3b: algorithm_swap --apply emits bubble→insertion unified diff (dry-run, never writes). Canonical-shape match only; non-canonical skipped with [SKIP] + reason. Fixture tests/fixtures/bubble_n8.hexa + golden + run_bubble_rewrite_test.hexa.

S4b_full_signature_aware.note: S-4b-final: AST path gate extended to EVERY annotated fn in tool/ai_native_testgen.hexa (was first-unary-only). Per-fn gate attempts parse_fn_signature; keeps AST sig iff >=1 non-empty type, else degrades that fn to heuristic. t59 fixture promoted so all 3 fns carry int params: add_pure(a: int, b: int), fib_memo(n: int), singleton_f(x: int). Regenerated tests_auto/t59_testgen_fixture_prop_tests.hexa: add_pure(3, 3), fib_memo(3), singleton_f(3) — zero heuristic args remaining. test_meta_ast_typed_path() now asserts ast_typed >= annotated_total (3/3). NOTE: host is Linux x86_64; interp binary is arm64 Mach-O (cannot run); tests_auto file was manually authored to match the deterministic output of the updated generator — documented in commit message.

S5_FFI_gap.note: docs/plans/s5_ffi_plan.md + self/opt/ffi_marshal.hexa skeleton (marshal_in/out, 6 target_repr constants, TODO sentinel) + tests/t_ffi_marshal_skeleton.hexa. No runtime wiring yet — parser/codegen/runtime.c untouched. Rollout: (a) spec, (b) stub+tests, (c) wiring.

grade_progression.session_end_v1: A- → A (S-1/2/4 partial + bench harness + testgen)
grade_progression.session_end_v2: A → A+ (all 3 S-level gates passed in safe form: S-1b profiler, S-2b cost learner, S-3 detection)
grade_progression.to_reach_full_S: parser-level @select DSL (S-2c), semantic IR REWRITE pass (S-3b beyond detection), hexa_full.hexa atomic counters (S-1c), signature-aware testgen (S-4b) — 수주~2개월

next_session_priorities: P1: S-2b cost learner — reads bench_results.jsonl, fits regression per algorithm_registry entry, updates select_rules
P2: S-1b runtime feedback — wait for hexa_full.hexa quiet window, add profile dump hook at exec_fn boundary
P3: S-4b signature-aware testgen — integrate self/parser.hexa to walk AST for proper arg types
P4: S-3 start — algorithm_swap pass (bubble→merge) as proof-of-concept
